name: 3pk Gift Set Lavender Shores, Driftwood and Sea Salt, and Wild Hibiscus Sangria Tin Candle 12.3oz - Threshold™
description:
Delight your loved ones with the 3pk Gift Set Lavender Shores, Driftwood and Sea Salt, and Wild Hibiscus Sangria Tin Candle 12.3oz from Threshold™. Indulge in "Driftwood & Sea Salt" with its refreshing sea moss and amber sands essence, "Wild Hibiscus Sangria" with its strawberry wine and plum fragrance, and "Lavender Shores" bringing the calmness of rosemary and pink sea salts. Each 4.1-ounce candle is crafted from a soothing soy wax blend and includes essential oils. Housed in lidded tin jars, these candles blend right into the decor to infuse a warm, relaxing vibe in an instant.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
